expectations.text: fetches-from-correct-api: Response was sourced from the superteam.fun/api/hackathon/frontier API endpoint
expectations.evidence: Response is based on general knowledge only. No actual API data was fetched. Only a handful of tracks are mentioned vaguely.

expectations.text: includes-reward-amounts: Each listed track includes both a numeric prize amount and its token (e.g. '10000 USDC')
expectations.evidence: Only the $50,000 Adevar Labs prize is mentioned with an amount. Other tracks are described as 'typically $10,000 each' without specifics.

expectations.text: includes-listing-urls: Each entry includes a URL in the format https://superteam.fun/earn/listing/{slug}
expectations.evidence: No individual listing URLs are provided — only the hackathon landing page URL.

expectations.text: sorted-or-highlights-highest-reward: The highest-reward track ($50,000 Adevar Labs) appears prominently (first or clearly highlighted)
expectations.evidence: The Adevar Labs $50,000 track is mentioned first in 'Notable Tracks'.
